buttons.primary_classes: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white hover:bg-[#FF5248] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,59,48,0.4)] transition-all uppercase font-bold tracking-wider
buttons.secondary_classes: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#A3A3A3] text-white hover:border-white transition-all uppercase font-bold tracking-wider

cards.classes: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-xl

scorebug.classes: bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b-4 border-[#FF3B30] flex items-center justify-between skew-x-[-7deg] rounded-sm p-4 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

visual_enhancers.shadows: Hard drop shadows for text (drop-shadow-lg) to ensure readability over action, bright glow for active elements
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid strokes (border-white/10) with sharp inner glow highlights
visual_enhancers.motion: Fast, snappy, reactive animations. No slow fades. Use framer-motion for pop-ins and stat counters.

images.description: Thrilling night baseball game at Hanshin Koshien Stadium in Japan with vibrant crowd. Used as the main immersive background for the lobby/home screen.
A dark silhouette of a baseball player. Good for character/team selection screen.
Gold trophy isolated. Used for leaderboard and rewards screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Barlow Condensed' is imported for headers and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Do not use generic fonts like Inter for headers.
Design the UI to look like a modern ESPN sports broadcast: heavy use of dark panels, sharp red/blue accents, and angled graphics.
Implement the scoreboard with a 7-degree skew (`skew-x-[-7deg]`) but un-skew the text inside (`skew-x-[7deg]`).
Use glass-morphism for stat-card overlays (`bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10`) to overlay on the background.
Action buttons (Pitch, Swing, Quick Match) must be pill-shaped (`rounded-full`) with uppercase, tracking-wide typography.
The diamond/field visualization should be a prominent hero element. Use SVG/CSS to make it look like a high-tech tactical map.
Add a global noise/grain texture overlay to add depth and broadcast feel.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="quick-match-button"`).
